history.en: The Japanese Bobtail is an active, sweet, loving and highly intelligent breed. They love to be with people and play seemingly endlessly. They learn their name and respond to it. They bring toys to people and play fetch with a favorite toy for hours. Bobtails are social and are at their best when in the company of people. They take over the house and are not intimidated. If a dog is in the house, Bobtails assume Bobtails are in charge.
history.zh: 日本短尾猫是一种活跃、甜美、充满爱心且非常聪明的品种。它们喜欢与人在一起，似乎永无止境地玩耍。它们能学会自己的名字并做出回应。它们会带玩具给人，并花几个小时玩最喜欢的玩具的取回游戏。短尾猫善于社交，在与人相处时表现最佳。它们会占据整个家，并且不畏惧。如果家里有狗，短尾猫会认为它们说了算。

overview.en: The Japanese Bobtail is a lively, intelligent, and affectionate cat breed originating from Japan. Known for its distinctive short, pom-pom-like tail, this breed is highly social and thrives on human companionship. Bobtails are playful and energetic, often described as dog-like in their loyalty and willingness to fetch toys or learn tricks. They are clever and curious, always exploring their surroundings and engaging with family members. Despite their active nature, they are easygoing and adapt well to various households. Their sweet temperament makes them excellent companions for children and other pets. Japanese Bobtails are natural entertainers, bringing joy with their antics and forming deep bonds with their owners. They are not shy and will confidently take charge of their home, ensuring they are always part of the action.
overview.zh: 日本短尾猫是一种活泼、聪明且深情的猫品种，起源于日本。以其独特的短而蓬松的尾巴而闻名，这种猫高度社交，喜欢人类陪伴。它们顽皮且精力充沛，常被描述为像狗一样忠诚，愿意取回玩具或学习技巧。它们聪明好奇，总是探索周围环境并与家人互动。尽管活跃，它们性格随和，能适应各种家庭环境。温柔的天性使它们成为儿童和其他宠物的绝佳伴侣。日本短尾猫是天生的娱乐者，通过滑稽动作带来欢乐，并与主人建立深厚纽带。它们不害羞，会自信地掌控家庭，确保始终参与家庭活动。

care.en: Daily care for a Japanese Bobtail is relatively low-maintenance. Their short, silky coat requires minimal grooming—a weekly brushing to remove loose hair and maintain shine is sufficient. They are active cats and need daily interactive play sessions, such as fetch or puzzle toys, to satisfy their high energy and intelligence. Providing climbing structures, cat trees, or window perches will keep them entertained. Regular veterinary check-ups are essential, including vaccinations and dental care. Their ears should be checked weekly for dirt or wax, and nails trimmed every two weeks. Despite their activity, they are adaptable to apartment living as long as they have enough stimulation. Bobtails are generally healthy, but routine vet visits help monitor for common issues like obesity or dental disease.
care.zh: 日本短尾猫的日常护理相对简单。它们短而丝滑的毛发只需每周梳理一次，以去除死毛并保持光泽。它们非常活跃，需要每天互动玩耍，如取回游戏或益智玩具，以满足其高能量和智力需求。提供攀爬架、猫树或窗台栖息处能让它们保持快乐。定期兽医检查必不可少，包括疫苗接种和牙齿护理。每周检查耳朵是否有污垢或耳蜡，每两周修剪一次指甲。尽管活跃，它们能适应公寓生活，只要有足够的刺激。日本短尾猫通常健康，但定期兽医访问有助于监测肥胖或牙齿疾病等常见问题。

training.en: Training a Japanese Bobtail is a rewarding experience due to their high intelligence and eagerness to please. They learn their name quickly and respond to voice commands. Positive reinforcement methods, such as treats and praise, work best. Start with basic commands like 'sit' or 'come,' and they will likely enjoy fetch or agility training. Use clicker training to teach tricks like high-five or spin. Bobtails are sensitive to tone, so avoid harsh corrections. Keep sessions short (5–10 minutes) and fun to maintain their interest. They are natural problem-solvers, so puzzle feeders can double as training tools. Consistency and patience are key, and they thrive on routine. Early socialization with people and other pets ensures a well-adjusted adult cat. Their playful nature makes training a bonding experience.
training.zh: 训练日本短尾猫是一种回报丰富的体验，因为它们非常聪明且渴望取悦主人。它们能快速学会自己的名字并对语音指令做出反应。正面强化方法，如零食和表扬，效果最好。从基本指令如“坐下”或“过来”开始，它们可能会喜欢取回或敏捷训练。使用响片训练教它们击掌或旋转等技巧。日本短尾猫对语气敏感，因此避免严厉纠正。保持训练简短（5-10分钟）且有趣，以维持它们的兴趣。它们是天然的问题解决者，益智喂食器可兼作训练工具。一致性和耐心是关键，它们喜欢有规律的生活。早期与人和宠物的社交能确保成年后适应良好。它们顽皮的天性使训练成为增进感情的过程。

diet.en: Japanese Bobtails require a balanced diet rich in high-quality protein to support their active lifestyle. Feed them a mix of wet and dry commercial cat food that meets AAFCO standards. Protein sources like chicken, fish, or turkey are ideal. Since they are prone to obesity if overfed, portion control is crucial. Adult cats typically need two meals per day, while kittens require three to four smaller meals. Fresh water should always be available. Avoid excessive treats and table scraps. Some Bobtails may have food sensitivities, so monitor for digestive issues. Consult your vet for specific dietary needs, especially if your cat is spayed/neutered or has health concerns. Omega-3 fatty acids from fish oil can support their coat health. A consistent feeding schedule helps maintain their energy levels.
diet.zh: 日本短尾猫需要均衡饮食，富含高质量蛋白质以支持其活跃生活方式。喂食符合AAFCO标准的湿粮和干粮混合物。鸡肉、鱼或火鸡等蛋白质来源是理想选择。由于它们容易因过度喂食而肥胖，控制份量至关重要。成年猫通常每天两餐，而幼猫需要三到四餐小份量。应始终提供新鲜水。避免过多零食和剩饭。有些日本短尾猫可能有食物敏感，因此需监控消化问题。咨询兽医以了解特定饮食需求，特别是如果猫已绝育或有健康问题。鱼油中的Omega-3脂肪酸可支持毛发健康。一致的喂食时间表有助于维持它们的能量水平。

livingTips.en: Japanese Bobtails are highly adaptable and thrive in various living environments, including apartments and houses with yards. They are social and do best when not left alone for long periods; consider a companion pet if you work long hours. Their playful nature makes them excellent with children who respect their boundaries, and they typically get along well with cat-friendly dogs. Provide plenty of vertical space, like cat trees or shelves, for climbing and perching. Interactive toys and scratching posts are essential to prevent boredom. They are not destructive but need outlets for their energy. A secure outdoor enclosure or supervised leash walks can satisfy their curiosity. Bobtails are confident and will assert dominance over other pets, so gradual introductions are recommended. Overall, they are a joy in any household with active engagement.
livingTips.zh: 日本短尾猫适应性强，能在各种生活环境茁壮成长，包括公寓和有院子的房子。它们社交性强，不喜欢长时间独处；如果工作时间长，考虑养另一只宠物陪伴。它们顽皮的天性使它们与尊重界限的儿童相处融洽，通常与对猫友好的狗相处良好。提供大量垂直空间，如猫树或架子，供攀爬和栖息。互动玩具和抓板对防止无聊至关重要。它们不具破坏性，但需要释放能量的途径。安全的户外围栏或监督下用牵引绳散步可以满足它们的好奇心。日本短尾猫自信，会主导其他宠物，因此建议逐步引入。总的来说，在活跃的家庭中，它们是快乐的源泉。
